channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says Iran downed Apache helicopter, US must react
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump vows to ‘respond’ after Iran ‘shot down’ a US helicopter
- Trump vows retaliation after claiming Iran shot down Apache helicopter
- Iran shot down 'highly sophisticated' attack helicopter, Trump says
- Urgent: Trump says U.S. forces "must" respond after Iran shot down U.S. helicopter near Hormuz Strait
- Trump Blames Iran for Downing of U.S. Helicopter and Vows to Retaliate
- Trump Vows Response After Iran Shoots Down US Helicopter
- Iran shot down 'highly sophisticated' attack helicopter, Trump says
- Trump blames Iran for helicopter downing, says US must respond
- Trump says US ‘must’ respond after alleged Iranian attack on helicopter
- Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter over Hormuz, vows to respond
- Trump says Iran downed US Apache helicopter, vows US response
- Trump says U.S. "must" respond after Iran downs Apache helicopter
- Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
- Trump vows to ‘respond’ after Iran ‘shot down’ a US helicopter
- Trump says US ‘must respond’ after reported downing of Army helicopter near Strait of Hormuz
- US must respond to Iran’s downing of Apache helicopter, Trump warns
- Trump says Iran shot down US Apache helicopter and vows response
- Trump blames Iran for downing of army helicopter and says US must respond
- Trump Says Iran Shot Down U.S. Helicopter and Vows to Retaliate
- Trump vows response after Iran shoots down US helicopter
- Trump blames Iran for helicopter attack, says US must respond
- ‘US must respond’, says Trump after claim of Iranian attack on Apache helicopter
- Trump vows revenge on Iran for Apache shoot-down
- Trump Vows America Will Answer After Iran Shoots Down U.S. Helicopter
- Trump vows response against Iran after downing of US helicopter
- Trump says US 'must' respond after Iran downs helicopter]]>

- BYD and Alibaba among big names aiding China’s military, Pentagon says]]>

item.title: Nuclear weapons spending surges to record high of $119bn, report says

- Nuclear weapons spending hits record high amid new ‘arms race’
